name: sTune
description: OxeBots fork of sTune - Open loop PID autotuner using a novel s-curve inflection point test method. Tuning parameters are determined in about ½Tau on a first-order system with time delay. Full 5Tau testing and multiple serial output options are provided.
keywords: PID, autotune, autotuner, tuner, tune, stune, inflection, step
